name: Cross-Account Access Anomaly Response
description: Detects anomalous cross-account role assumptions in multi-account cloud environments. Riggs AI evaluates whether the cross-account access is authorized by analyzing the assuming account, role trust policies, and historical patterns. Unauthorized access triggers role assumption audit, trust policy restriction, credential access investigation, incident ticket, and team notification. Authorized access is documented.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: AWS Security Hub
required_integrations.reason: Source of cross-account access findings and IAM policy management

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create incident tickets for unauthorized cross-account access events

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify the security team of cross-account access anomalies

config.description: Triggers when an anomalous cross-account role assumption is detected via CloudTrail STS:AssumeRole events from unexpected accounts or regions

config.additional_instructions: Evaluate cross-account role assumption: is the source account in our organization, is this role normally assumed by this principal, are the accessed resources consistent with the role purpose
config.description: AI-powered analysis of cross-account access patterns to determine if the role assumption is authorized or represents a breach of trust boundaries
Routes based on whether the AI assessment determined the cross-account access is unauthorized

config.query: CloudTrail STS:AssumeRole events for role={{trigger_1.alert.role_arn}} in last 30 days: source accounts, source IPs, frequency, API calls made with assumed credentials
config.description: Audit all role assumption events for the affected role to build a baseline and identify all unauthorized access

parameters.reason: Unauthorized cross-account access detected — restricting trust policy

config.description: Update the IAM role trust policy to deny the unauthorized source account from assuming the role

config.query: All API calls made with temporary credentials from session={{trigger_1.alert.session_name}} in target account: resources accessed, modifications made, data downloaded
config.description: Investigate what the unauthorized cross-account session accessed to determine blast radius and data exposure
Create an incident ticket documenting the unauthorized cross-account access and response actions
Notify the security team of the unauthorized cross-account access and all containment actions

parameters.note: Reviewed by Riggs AI (credential_access template). Cross-account role assumption determined to be authorized. Source account is within the organization trust boundary. Assessment: {{analyze_1.summary}}

config.description: Document that the cross-account access was determined to be authorized
